prompt: Premium Instagram Stories advertisement. An amber glass supplement bottle in the foreground, sharp focus. The bottle label reads: at the top a small diamond outline logo mark, below it LUMINARY in elegant uppercase serif, and below that Daily Vitality Complex in smaller refined type. In the soft-focus background, a woman's hands holding a glass of water and a capsule — implying daily use ritual. Warm morning light. Cream and forest green palette (#F5F0E8 cream, #2D6A4F forest green). The label design is clean, premium, apothecary-style. Real brand quality. Avoid generic stock photography, neon colors, AI glow effects, floating pills, busy backgrounds. 9:16 portrait.
